  "schema": "infrafactory.output.v1",
  "result": {
    "command": "run",
    "scenario": "example-scenario",
    "status": "failed",
    "stages": [
      {
        "layer": "sandbox_deploy",
        "stage": "blocked",
        "status": "skip",
        "detail": "layer enabled but implementation is deferred (real deployment skipped for cost reasons for now)"
      }
    ],
    "failures": [
      {
        "layer": "sandbox_deploy",
        "stage": "blocked",
        "check": "sandbox_deploy",
        "command": "layer gate",
        "detail": "sandbox/live deploy layer is intentionally deferred due cost/credentials policy (real deployment skipped for cost reasons for now)"
      }
    ],
    "explainability": [
      {
        "layer": "sandbox_deploy",
        "stage": "blocked",
        "check": "sandbox_deploy",
        "summary": "sandbox deploy execution is intentionally blocked by governance policy",
        "action": "keep sandbox_deploy disabled until explicit cost and credentials approval is documented"
      }
    ]
  }
}
Usage:
  run <scenario> [flags]

Flags:
      --config string         (default "./infrafactory.yaml")
  -h, --help                 help for run
      --max-iterations int   
      --output string         (default "human")
